channel.title: LotsofSunshine Insider — Land Newsletter
channel.description: Affordable vacant land with owner financing, plus land news and owner-financing tips from Lots of Sunshine — Florida, Arizona, Arkansas.

item.title: Your Florida Land Awaits ☀️ Lake Farm and Cave Country
item.description:
Hubert called me from Albany, Georgia last week. He's not after a place to live — he wants to build a single-family rental and let good land and steady tenants do the work. His ask was specific: North Florida near the Georgia line, a quarter to half acre, site-built homes, and a price that pencils out. We found four lots that fit what he's after.

See how Martin bought his land with no bank →

If you've ever thought about owning land that earns instead of just sitting, keep reading. Every one of these is owner-financed with no credit check, priced where the numbers can actually work for a build.

Si alguna vez has pensado en tener un terreno que genere ingresos en lugar de solo estar ahí, sigue leyendo. Cada uno de estos lo financiamos nosotros mismos, sin revisar tu crédito, a un precio donde los números sí funcionan para construir.

The one Hubert keeps circling back to —

Full Acre in Marianna — Just over an acre on a quiet residential street, minutes from downtown Marianna and its county hospital — the kind of steady town that keeps a rental full. Florida Caverns and Jackson Blue Springs pull visitors year-round. Room for a proper site-built home with a yard. $749 down, $348/mo.

If you want a lakeside lot renters pay a premium for —

Lakeside Lot on Round Lake — A third-acre on the edge of a quiet 30-acre freshwater lake, ten minutes from Marianna. Lake access is the kind of line that lets a rental command more every month. Lower entry than the Marianna acre. $499 down, $339/mo.

Round Lake — a third-acre on the water, ten minutes from Marianna. $499 down.

If you want the shortest drive from home and the deepest discount —

1.1 Acres Near the Suwannee River, Jennings — The closest of the four to Albany, with Valdosta just 25 miles north. Site-built homes are welcome, the Suwannee River is minutes away for fishing and camping, and it's running 25% off the cash price right now. $499 down, $401/mo.

And if you want the lowest price and the strongest return —

Quarter Acre in Dunnellon — Paved roads, power at the street, and R1 zoning that keeps out mobile homes and protects your rental comps. Lowest cash price of the four at $18,997, minutes from the crystal-clear Rainbow River. $299 down, $301/mo.

See All 4 Lots →

Hubert's running his numbers this week and picking one. If you've been sitting on the same idea — build something that pays you back — I offer a free Land Intro Call. Fifteen minutes, no pressure. We'll figure out together what makes sense for your budget and your plans.

Book a free call → introcall.lotsofsunshine.com

¿Prefieres hablar en español? Tenemos personas en nuestro equipo que hablan español y con gusto te ayudan a encontrar tu terreno. Reserva una llamada gratis → introcall.lotsofsunshine.com

item.title: Owner Financed Land ☀️ 3 North Florida Lots From $499 Down
item.description:
Alina called me last week from Miami. She runs a trucking business and needed a place to park her rigs and drop a storage container — open land up north near the highway, not a lot squeezed into a subdivision. Room to work. Room to breathe.

Before I show you her lots, one thing. Alina asked the smartest question of the whole call: what do I check before I sign? I made a video that walks through exactly that. Watch it before you put money down on any land — mine or anyone else's.

Do this first — what to check before you buy any piece of land.

She is not the only one asking, either. More people every week want land they can actually put to use — for a business, for equipment, for a homestead, for whatever they are building. So here are the three lots I sent her. All owner financed, no credit check, each one sitting right on a highway corridor.

If you want land you can actually put to work —

1.1 Acres Near the Suwannee River, Jennings — Open pine country a straight run from I-75, where you can farm it, build on it, or keep your trucks and trailers on site. On sale right now at 25 percent off the cash price. $499 down, $401/mo.

Over an Acre Near the Georgia Line, Jennings — Another open acre at the top of the state, a clear shot up I-75 into Valdosta, with the roads kept maintained year-round so you can reach your land in every season. $999 down, $405/mo.

Jennings — open ground near the Suwannee River, minutes from I-75, from $499 down.

If you would rather set up a homesite —

A Full Acre in Marianna — Just over an acre on the I-10 corridor with utilities and paved roads close by, minutes from the springs and walk-through caves that make this corner of the state worth the drive. The lightest monthly of the three. $749 down, $348/mo.

Marianna — a full acre on the I-10 corridor, paved roads close, from $749 down.

See All 3 Lots →

Not sure which one fits? I offer a free Land Intro Call — 15 minutes, no pressure. We will figure out together what makes sense for your budget and what you want the land to do for you.

Book a free call → introcall.lotsofsunshine.com

Talk soon,
Kirk

item.title: Buildable Land 🇺🇸 3 Lots Near Gainesville $499 Down
item.description:
Rick, a home builder, called me from Cherry Valley, Illinois last week. Twenty-five years swinging hammers, done with the winters, and he wants one thing before he moves down: his own piece of ground — room to build a house and park his dozers and excavators.

Hear why Andrae bought his land with us →

I hear that from a lot of you. So I pulled the three lots I sent Rick — all owner-financed, no credit check, a short drive from where the work is.

If you want room to build and room to work —

4 Acres in Interlachen — nearly four acres tucked between 37 lakes, and the zoning lets you put two homes on it: your place plus a second home or rental that helps carry the note while you get set up. No HOA committee. Plenty of room to store equipment while you build. $1,999 down, $1,423/mo.

4.54 Acres in Satsuma — the biggest lot on my board right now, listed the same day Rick called. A paved road runs right to it, most of it is high and dry buildable ground, and it's one of the largest parcels east of the St. Johns River. More land than the Interlachen lot at a lower cash price. $1,499 down, $1,282/mo.

Satsuma — 4.54 acres, high and dry, biggest lot on the board. $1,499 down.

If you want a low-cost foot in the door —

1.1 Acres in Jennings — an acre-plus of North Florida farm ground near the Georgia line. Farm it, raise animals, store your equipment, or build almost any kind of home, with only a light road-upkeep fee. The twin lot next door is available too — grab both and you've got 2.2 acres side by side. $499 down, $401/mo.

Jennings — 1.1 acres of ag land near the Georgia line, twin lot next door. $499 down.

See These 3 Lots →

Rick's driving out Thursday to walk both of the bigger lots back to back — they sit about 20 minutes apart. If you want to do the same, or you're just not sure which one fits your budget and your plans, I offer a free Land Intro Call. Fifteen minutes, no pressure. We'll figure out together what makes sense for you.

Book a free call → introcall.lotsofsunshine.com

item.title: Florida Land ☀️ Half an Acre From $199 Down
item.description:
Joshua called me last week with a plan I'd never heard. He didn't want a house. He wanted half an acre to bottle water and grow food in hydroponic containers.

Raw land is a blank canvas. One buyer sees a homestead. The next sees a weekend camper spot. Joshua sees a farm in shipping containers. His three favorites are still available.

Watch the 60-second land idea →

If you want to farm it, grow it, and live free —

Half an Acre of Opportunity, Palatka — Nearly half an acre just outside town where you can grow crops, raise a few animals, or run a small operation like Joshua's, with power already sitting at the street. This is the one he ranked first. $399 down, $340/mo.

Half an acre near Palatka, room to build and grow, from $399 down.

If you want maximum flexibility and the lowest possible entry —

Legacy Lot, Interlachen — A quiet third-acre with room for a home plus a second dwelling down the road. It's the lowest entry point of the three and the fastest to pay off. $199 down, $283/mo.

Dual-Living Land, Satsuma — A little larger, tucked into the St. Johns River corridor, with the same freedom to put up a home now and add a second place later. $199 down, $319/mo.

item.title: Land Deals - Escape winter on HUGE Florida land $749 Down
item.description:
Josh called me from Montreal this week. He is done with the long winters and wants to build a barndominium compound in the Florida sun, with room for his kids, their families, and a few of his crew.

"How does financing even work for Canadians?" he asked.

Easier than you think. We give you the financing!

  • No bank
  • No credit check

You just need a US bank account.

Josh is far from the only Canadian looking south.

If you want room for the whole family —

4.54 Acres on the St. Johns River, Satsuma — 4.5 acres of high, dry ground where you can build a few homes, with a paved road to your door and one of the best fishing rivers in the state just minutes away. $1,499 down, $1,282/mo.

Riverside acreage in Satsuma — room to build, minutes from the water.

Or plant your flag this year for less —

Over an Acre of Farmland, Jennings — A homestead-ready acre near the Georgia line where you can build, garden, and raise a few animals all on the same lot, with maintained roads and the Suwannee River close by. $999 down, $405/mo.

Wide-open farmland in Jennings — build, garden, and raise a few animals.

A Full Acre in Cave Country, Marianna — The lowest way in of the three, and the easiest to start now. A buildable acre minutes from Florida Caverns and the 68-degree spring water at Jackson Blue. $749 down, $348/mo.

Before you buy any land, watch this. It is seven minutes and it answers almost every question I get, whether you are calling from Toronto or Tampa.

Watch this first before you buy land →

Brand new to the market and priced to move, so it will not sit long. $1,499 down, $1,282/mo.

item.title: Fresh Land Deals 🇺🇸 35% Off Freedom Days Lots
item.description:
The fireworks have faded, but the reason behind them has not. America just turned 250, and there is no better way to mark a country built on independence than owning a piece of ground that answers to you. The good news: our Freedom Days deals and a fresh batch of new lots are both still live, so you did not miss a thing.

Watch the 60-second Freedom Days look →

Through the end of July, every Freedom Days lot comes with:

Up to 35% off the cash price — and these prices are already discounted to begin with.

Half off your down payment — the lowest entry we offer all year, already built into the numbers below.

180 days same as cash — Pay the balance off in six months and keep your huge cash discount.

Here are the six Freedom Days lots worth a hard look before the prices go back up.

If you want to live on the water —

Lake Country Homestead, Interlachen — Nearly four acres in the town between 37 lakes, zoned for two homes, with a road that runs straight to Rodman Reservoir's bass water. $108,397 cash (was $135,495), or $1,999 down and $1,423/mo.

Interlachen — four lake-country acres, now $108,397 through Freedom Days.

If you want to farm it, grow it, and live free —

Suwannee Farm Acre, Jennings — A full acre of North Florida ag land minutes from the Suwannee River, cleared for animals, crops, and a home of your own. $27,997 cash (was $34,997), or $499 down and $401/mo.

If you want to hunt, camp, and hold something that grows in value —

Quiet Forest Lot, Interlachen — The largest lot on a wooded street, where every tree that falls is yours and the nearest neighbor is a long way off. $22,397 cash (was $28,997), or $299 down and $341/mo.

If you want to build in a real community —

Twin Builder's Lots, North Port — Two paved-road lots with power at the street in one of the fastest-growing cities in the country. Buy one to build, or both to double down. $24,997 cash each (was $32,997), or $199 down and $382/mo.

And for the wide-open adventure —

Desert Adventure Acre, Sanders — Over an acre of high Arizona desert at Bell Brand Ranches, room for horses, an RV, and nothing overhead but sky. $10,347 cash (was $13,597), or $149 down and $220/mo.

Just listed this week —

If you would rather have first pick of brand-new ground, we just dropped a dozen fresh lots onto the site. These are not part of the Freedom Days discount, but they carry the same low-down owner financing with no credit check.

Lakeside Lot, Round Lake — A third of an acre built for fishing mornings and slow evenings, your way. $23,997, or $499 down and $339/mo.

Round Lake — lakeside living, just listed at $23,997.

Wilderness Acre, Green Pond — Over an acre of untouched ground near the Florida National Scenic Trail, for the camper and the long-term holder. $14,997, or $249 down and $235/mo.

Cave Country Acre, Marianna — A full acre in the heart of Florida's cavern country, room to build and room to breathe. $24,997, or $749 down and $348/mo.

Coot Road Quarter, Satsuma — Mobile, tiny, or site-built all welcome on this low-entry quarter acre. $11,997, or $199 down and $198/mo.

And a handful more from Punta Gorda to Placid Lakes, all on the site now.

See Freedom Days and New Listings →

Not sure which lot is the right fit? I offer a free Land Intro Call. Fifteen minutes, no pressure. We will figure out together what makes sense for your budget and your goals, and whether a Freedom Days discount or a fresh new lot is the smarter move for you.

The Freedom Days discounts run through the end of July, then the prices go back up. There is no better month to plant a flag of your own.

Book a free call → introcall.lotsofsunshine.com

item.title: Land Deal 💚 Northern Florida Acre $749
item.description:
Mitzi called me from Northwest Florida with a problem I hear more and more often: she has six rescue dogs and four cats, and no landlord will take her. So she stopped hunting for a rental and started looking for a piece of land she could actually own — somewhere to set a tiny home now and build the real one later.

Watch the 60-second story →

I pulled three lots for Mitzi, and they are the same three I would point you to if you have ever felt boxed in by renting. All three welcome a tiny or container home, all three are owner financed with no credit check, and the down payments start at $199.

If you want real room to breathe in the Florida panhandle —

Full Acre in Marianna — Just over an acre in Florida's cave country, an hour from Panama City Beach, with space for a tiny home, a garden, and all ten animals to roam. $749 down, $348/mo.

The full acre near Marianna — tiny home ready, $749 down.

Lakeside Lot in Round Lake — A quiet quarter acre on the edge of a thirty-acre freshwater lake, ten minutes from Marianna, where a tiny home would sit right by the water. $499 down, $339/mo.

If you want the lowest way in —

Quarter Acre on Coot Road, Satsuma — The one lot that names a container home outright, near the St. Johns River and ten minutes from Palatka, with the most flexible zoning we sell. $199 down, $198/mo.

Mitzi's three were all part of the same fresh drop, so while you are looking, the button below shows them alongside every new listing and every Freedom Days deal we have on right now.

See Mitzi's Lots and Every New Deal →

Mitzi's down payment was ready the day she called. Yours does not have to be. But if you have been turned away from a rental, or you are just tired of paying down someone else's mortgage, a low-cost piece of land is a real way out.

The kind of place where the St. Johns River is a short drive and Palatka is ten minutes up the road.

Watch the 60-second tour →

Here is the thing about that corner. It moves. Two of the lots buyers had been circling just went under contract this week. Same owner financing, no credit check, the freedom to put a mobile home, a tiny home, or two homes on one lot. Spoken for before most people finished thinking about them.

Hawknest Road, Satsuma — a quarter acre where rent builds nothing and this builds equity. $199 down, $198/mo.

A mobile-home-ready quarter acre in Interlachen — a blank canvas with a dirt road in and room for two homes on one lot. $49 down, $221/mo.

If you have been waiting for a sign, watching two lots disappear in a week is it.

Now the good news. The one lot Bobby keeps coming back to is still open, and so are three more cut from the same cloth as the ones that sold.

item.title: Father's Day Land Deals ☀️ 3 Florida Lots From $199 Down
item.description:
Lamarr called me from Philadelphia earlier this week. He's a dad — and he's thinking like one. Not a vacation. Not a gadget. He wants land for a family compound — a place where his kids have room to run, his parents can come and stay, and his brothers and cousins have somewhere to land when they visit. Multiple structures on one property. Room for the nuclear family and the extended family. No landlord. No HOA. No one telling the family what it can and can't do on its own piece of Florida.

Watch: how owner financing works →

We found him three Florida properties that checked every box. All three are still available today with owner financing and no credit check required.

And if you want to build a family compound on Florida land —

4 Acres in Florida's Lake Country, Interlachen — 3.96 acres zoned R-2 Two Family. Two separate homes, one parcel. Tiny home next to the main structure. Guest cottage for parents and cousins. Rental unit while you plan the build. Mobile, manufactured, site-built, or container — all welcome, no HOA. Interlachen has 37 freshwater lakes in its town limits, Rodman Reservoir for bass fishing, Ocala National Forest close by, Palatka 16 miles east. item.title: 3 Florida Acres ☀️ From $99 Down $253 a Month
item.description:
Marion almost didn't even pick up the phone for his Land Intro Call with me.

He's 32. Married, a few kids, running a Boy Scout troop and a nonprofit for the youth in his community. A man who shows up for everyone around him. But every time land ownership came up — actually doing it — something got in the way. The credit wasn't right. The timing wasn't perfect. The plan needed just a little more time.

Watch this before you buy anything — it's 10 minutes and worth every second.

His wife had a word for it. She said he talked more than he acted.

Last Friday, he picked up the phone. We talked for 18 minutes. By the end of the call, he had three properties in his inbox and was sitting down with his wife to choose.

I'm sharing those same three lots with you today — because if any part of Marion's story sounds familiar, this email is for you.

If you know what you'd build and you just need the land —

1.25 Acres on Lisa Ann Trail, Palatka — Agricultural-zoned land where you can raise animals, put up a container home, build structures. No deed restrictions. No one telling you what goes where. This is the canvas Marion had been describing his whole life. $499 down, $359/mo.

Palatka, FL — 1.25 acres, agricultural zoning, $499 down.

If you want to plant a flag — and you want it to be affordable —

A Full Acre in Marianna — The most affordable property in our current inventory. A monthly payment lower than most car notes. The kind of number that makes it genuinely hard to say "not yet" one more time. $749 down, $253/mo.

If $99 is all it takes to stop talking and start owning —

1.25 Acres in Hastings — Ninety-nine dollars locks this one in. That is not a typo. If you have been telling yourself you are not ready, this lot has a simple question for you: what exactly are you waiting for? $99 down, $284/mo.

Hastings, FL — 1.25 acres, $99 down, $284/mo.

Marion ended the call with one thing on his mind — getting home, sitting down with his wife, and picking a lot. He didn't need more time. He needed a reason to go.

These three are still available. If you're ready, they're waiting for you right now.

item.title: Own Your Piece ☀️ 12 New Florida Lots From $199 Down
item.description:
Today I'm dropping 12 new lots from the Panhandle to Central Florida. Down payments start at $199. Every single one is owner financed — no bank, no credit check, no gatekeepers.

If you want to live on the water —

Lakeside Lot, Round Lake — A quiet 30-acre freshwater lake right at the edge of your door. Any home type welcome: site-built, manufactured, mobile, or tiny. This is the kind of place people stop driving around and start putting down roots. $499 down, $399/mo.

Camellia Drive, Indian Lake Estates — This community wraps around Polk County's largest lake — 7,500 acres, nationally known for bass fishing. The neighborhood has a marina, an 18-hole golf course, and the longest freshwater pier in the state. 1.1 acres with paved roads and power already in. $749 down, $346/mo.

Deep River Court, Placid Lakes — Placid Lakes sits on the shore of Lake June-in-Winter. Paved roads, a community boat ramp, and neighbors who've been here for decades. Quarter acre, zoned for a permanent site-built home. $199 down, $248/mo.

Sunway Drive, Placid Lakes — Same community, same lake access on Lake June-in-Winter, same boat ramp. A second lot a few blocks away if Deep River Court is already spoken for. $199 down, $248/mo.

Round Lake, Northwest Florida — 30-acre freshwater lake, any home type. $499 down, $399/mo.

And one near a wonder of the natural world —

Lilac Court, Marianna — Florida Caverns State Park — the only walk-through cave system in the state — is under five miles away. Jackson Blue Springs pumps 64 million gallons of crystal-clear 68-degree water a day, year-round. This is a full acre in a quiet residential neighborhood right in the middle of all of it. Any home type allowed. $749 down, $253/mo.

If you want to farm it, grow it, and live free —

Lisa Ann Trail, Palatka — Agricultural zoning on 1.25 acres means you can grow crops, raise animals, and build the home you want — all on the same piece of land. That combination is rare. Road access is in. Palatka and the St. Johns River are 10 minutes away. $499 down, $359/mo.

If you want to hunt, camp, and hold something that grows in value —

NW 27th Way, Jennings — 2.6 acres on the Suwannee River Corridor, right off I-75 at the Georgia line. Big Shoals State Park — the state's only Class III whitewater — is 20 minutes south. Wide open land where the pace is slow and the price still makes sense. $1,199 down, $398/mo.

James Street, Flagler Estates — 1.25 forested acres in a county where the land across the road sells for three times more. Road access in. Hunters and patient investors both win here. St. Augustine is 35 minutes northeast. $199 down, $249/mo.

Dona Street, Flagler Estates — Second lot in the same community, same acreage, same price point. The window to buy at today's prices in Flagler Estates won't stay open forever. Palm Coast is 25 minutes east when you need it. $199 down, $249/mo.

See All 12 New Listings →

Jennings, North Florida — 2.6 acres on the Suwannee Corridor. $1,199 down, $398/mo.

If you want to build your home in a real community —

Daisy Place, Sebring — Sebring is a town built around lakes, and people who move here on purpose tend to stay. Advent Health hospital is in town. Paved roads and power are already in. A quarter acre ready for a permanent site-built or modular home. $199 down, $248/mo.

If you want maximum flexibility and the lowest possible entry —

Coot Road, Satsuma — R-2 zoning means any home type is welcome: mobile, tiny, container, or site-built. You can put two homes on this lot. No HOA, no landlord. The St. Johns River is minutes away. $199 down, $198/mo.

Hawknest Road, Satsuma — Same flexible zoning, same river access, same entry point. If Coot Road is gone, this one is right here. First-time buyers — this is a solid place to start. $199 down, $198/mo.

Not sure which lot is the right fit? I offer a free Land Intro Call — 15 minutes, no pressure. We'll figure out together what makes sense for your budget and your goals.

Book a free call → introcall.lotsofsunshine.com

item.description:
Hey,

As we grow, we’re putting better systems in place to make sure you get faster, clearer, and more reliable support.

We’ve officially launched our Client Success Team, which will now handle all account questions, payment inquiries, and general support.

Going forward, please send all support requests to:

This helps us track every request properly so nothing gets missed. You’ll receive an automatic confirmation right away, and a response from our team within 24–48 hours.

Thanks for being a valued client. We appreciate the trust you’ve placed in us and look forward to continuing to support you.

item.title: 🌿 Verifying Kazzland, Inc. / LotsofSunshine.com — Transparency and Trust
item.description:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out and for taking the time to verify who you’re working with — we completely understand the importance of feeling confident and secure before moving forward with a land purchase.

Transparency and trust are top priorities for us at Kazzland, Inc. and LotsofSunshine.com.

Below are a few simple, direct ways to confirm our company’s legitimacy and ownership of properties we sell:

1. County Verification (Property Ownership)

Each property we sell includes the Assessor’s Parcel Number (APN). You can verify ownership directly through the county’s official website for that parcel — you’ll see Kazzland, Inc. listed as the deed holder.
(For example: Apache County, AZ – https://www.apachecountyaz.gov)

2. Business Registration
Our company is officially registered and active in the State of Florida. You can verify this anytime on the Florida Division of Corporations (Sunbiz) website:
🔗http://www.sunbiz.org

Simply search for Kazzland, Inc. to view our registration details and status.

3. Better Business Bureau (BBB)
You can also check our standing and reviews with the Better Business Bureau (BBB):
🔗 https://www.bbb.org

Search “Kazzland, Inc.” or “LotsofSunshine.com.”

4. Social Channels & Client Testimonials
We encourage you to explore our active online presence — we regularly post educational content, real client testimonials, and behind-the-scenes updates about our work and properties.

  • 🌐 Website: https://www.lotsofsunshine.com

  • 📺 YouTube:

Show as urlRemove

LotsofSunshine
Our mission is to help you invest in your dreams by making land easy and affordable. We educate you on the land buying ...
YouTube

  • 📷 Instagram & Facebook: @lotsofSunshine

These are great ways to see who we are, how we work, and how we support buyers throughout the land ownership process.

We’re always here to answer any questions or walk you through verification step by step — it’s important to us that you feel informed and comfortable every step of the way.

Warm regards,

Carrie Aquino
Sales Support Manager

Kazzland, Inc. | LotsofSunshine.com

📧 sales@kazzland.net 
📞954-639-4938

Not BIG enough for you?

Then Try this one…


Location: Palatka, Florida -> CLICK HERE

Zoning: Agricultural (raise all the goats you want)

Access:  Dirt Road with Nearby Power


APN: 33-10-26-0000-8888-0499

12 month same as cash deal to save $6000


===========

Owning land is one of the few assets that cuts through the BS. Dirt doesn’t lie. When Congress yells and the dollar shakes, your land stays right where you can see it.

Today, I’ll walk you through the hidden costs of land ownership (the ones politicians never talk about) — and show you how to spot them before they drain your pocket. That way, you can escape the circus and make a move that’s all about your security.

1. Hidden Costs Aren’t Always Obvious

In politics, hidden deals happen behind closed doors. In land, it’s mineral rights, timber rights, or even environmental messes that no one discloses until you’re knee-deep in trouble.

I’ve seen buyers shocked to discover someone else owns the trees on their lot — or worse, barrels of toxic sludge buried where their septic tank should go. That’s why due diligence matters. Unlike Congress, you can actually demand transparency.

2. Amenities & Distance Matter

Think shutdowns only affect D.C.? Think again. Rural communities feel it when gas prices rise or supply chains tighten. If your dream property is an hour from groceries or hardware, you need to be honest: is the peace worth the drive?

One of my clients, Brian, embraced it — when his Jeep got stuck on the way to his new land, he laughed and said, “If I can’t get there easy, neither can anyone else. I LOVE IT.” That’s the beauty of land: you get to define freedom, not Washington.

3. Due Diligence is Your Friend

Shutdowns remind us what happens when no one checks the details. Don’t let that happen with land. Walk the property. Talk to neighbors. Review restrictions. And if you can’t, at least make sure your seller offers a guarantee.

We back every sale with a 90-day guarantee, because trust is worth more than a political promise.

4. Infrastructure Adds Up

Just like government budgets hide “impact fees,” your land purchase can come with real costs: wells, septic, power, permits. They aren’t glamorous, but knowing about them upfront saves you from nasty surprises.

5. Watch Out for What’s Buried

A grassy field can hide old trash, oil drums, or worse. That’s why surveys and title searches are your version of congressional oversight — but with actual results.

The shutdown fight proves one thing: politicians don’t care about your financial security as much as you do. Land is one way to take control, cut through the noise, and protect your family’s future.

At LotsofSunshine.com, we make land easy and affordable:

  • No credit checks

  • Low down payments

  • Simple, no-BS contracts

👉 Check out our current properties now: LotsofSunshine.com

Or call me directly at (954) 639-4938 to talk through your options.

Forget the shutdown. Build your own security.

BTW - RICH PEOPLE are protecting themselves with land during these crazy times. See why in this video.

item.title: Land Deals - Why the Rich Buy All My Land?
item.description:
,

Why are the rich buying land in the US like never before?

Why are ordinary folks—many living paycheck to paycheck—scrambling to grab a few acres of their own?

What do they know that you don’t?

=======================

$99 🚌BACK-TO-SCHOOL land deal just for you.

The LotsofSunshine.com team just updated it with this amazing parcel that I think you might love.


Details;

  • Location: Palatka, Florida

  • Size: 1.08 Acres

  • Zoning: Agricultural

  • DownPayment: $99

  • Monthly Payment: $530

Link for more pictures -> CLICK HERE

=======================

The answers might shock you.

Deep down, people sense something is coming. The economy’s unstable. The dollar keeps shrinking. Inflation eats through savings. Political division tears the country apart. Grocery shelves thin out. Water costs more than gas. Cyberattacks on our power grid are now routine.

We’re one crisis away from chaos.

And the wealthy know it. That’s why they’re locking down millions of acres. Ordinary families feel it too—even if they can’t explain why. Land is security. Land is survival. And when the systems we depend on break, the only people safe are the ones standing on ground they own.

What the Billionaires Know

Jeff Bezos, Bill Gates, Elon Musk, Mark Zuckerberg—together they control vast amounts of American land. Not for luxury. For control. For protection. For the future.

But here’s the real story: it’s not just billionaires. Everyday people—teachers, truck drivers, small business owners—are buying land too. Because whether you’re a tech titan or a schoolteacher, one fact is true: they’re not making any more land.

As AI reshapes industries and uncertainty deepens, more people are realizing land is the one asset that holds steady while everything else feels like quicksand.

Sam Altman, CEO of OpenAI, even put it this way:

“The price of luxury goods and a few inherently limited resources like land may rise even more dramatically.”

Why Land Works for You

Owning land isn’t complicated. Start small: a quarter acre, a half acre, or even five. Build a cabin, hunt, fish, or just enjoy the peace of your own space.

Land doesn’t rise and crash like Wall Street. It’s stable, tangible, and real. And while raw land doesn’t send you a rent check every month, the upside is yours to create:

  • Farming, ranching, grazing, timber, or mining

  • Short- or long-term rentals (“Land BnB” is booming)

  • Renewable energy—solar and wind farms

  • And the most valuable resource of all: water

Did you know bottled water sells for nearly $10 a gallon—more than gas? Land with water access is more than valuable—it’s essential.

The Land Rush Is Here

Right now, the average acre in the U.S. is about $14,000. Smaller parcels can run higher, but large tracts drop to just a few hundred dollars per acre. And there are tax benefits too—interest on land loans may be deductible as investment interest.

Bottom line: land is one of the most consistent and flexible assets you can own. It holds value, provides options, and gives you something no stock or bond ever could—peace of mind and a piece of the future.

I believe we’re in the middle of another land rush. You can ignore it, but that won’t stop the world from changing. AI is rewriting the rules, and the ultra-rich—the ones with insider knowledge—are telling us exactly what matters most to them: land.

You can either watch it happen, or be part of it.

Take the Next Step

👉 Before inflation kicks up prices another 10% or more, check out our latest properties at LotsofSunshine.com.

Or give us a call directly at (954) 639-4938.

And if you want to protect yourself from costly mistakes, I made a video on the Top 5 Land Scams I encountered that nearly ruined me. Watch it now before you buy.



Be Great!

Kirk P.


LotsofSunshine.com

“Land made easy and affordable.”

item.description:
Hey !

At LotsofSunshine.com, we buy tons of properties every year. 

Just like YOU, we see listings that look perfect, but are they real?

====

3 VERIFIED Back to School Deals that will BLOW YOUR MIND

🌿 Big Dreams Meet Big Land 1.08 Acres in Palatka FL - $99 Down $535/month

🌿 Dive into Dual Living with R-2 Land in Palatka Florida - $99 Down $284/month

Your Slice of Paradise On a Half Acre in Satsuma FL - $99 Down $295/month 

====

So, made this video just for you  to help spot the biggest land scams out there.

The 5 biggest land scams you need to watch out for

These are my real stories from a real land buyer just like you.


Scams You’ll Learn About

  1. Brent the Bad Broker – He sold the same property twice.

  2. Nathan the Naïve Nephew – Thought his dead uncle’s will gave him the land. Spoiler: it didn’t!

  3. Fractional Francine – Only owned half the property, but tried to sell the whole thing.

  4. The Taxation Disaster – One missed tax bill, and the county stole the land out from under us.

  5. The Zoning Fiasco – Looked buildable, but was actually inside a conservation zone.

Each of these stories comes with simple solutions you can use today. 

It is your “deepfake detector” for land deals.

Why This Matters Right Now

  • Scams are everywhere. verify before you believe.

  • Exhaustion makes you sloppy. tired buyers skip due diligence. That’s how scammers win.

  • But you can stay ahead. With some simple checks—title, zoning, ownership—you can avoid 90% of land scams.

Watch my full video breakdown here https://youtu.be/7TvacY5rh5k 

Grab my free ebook: Kirk’s Land Scams Red Flag Checklist [COMING SOON]

Or if you’re ready to buy land the easy, affordable, and scam-free way, check out LotsofSunshine.com.

Land ownership is real wealth—protect it.

Be Great!
Kirk P.

item.title: LAND DEALS - ⚠️ 5 Money Sucking Land Scams
item.description:
,

At LotsofSunshine.com, we buy tons of properties a year.

And just like you, we see listings that look perfect—great photos, great price, even a great story behind them. But are they real?


That’s why I created this breakdown: the 5 biggest land scams you need to watch out for.

Scam Stories You’ll Learn About

  1. Brent the Bad Broker – He sold the same property twice, before the county records caught up.

  2. Nathan the Naïve Nephew – Thought his dead uncle’s will gave him the land. Spoiler: it didn’t.

  3. Fractional Francine – Only owned half the property, but tried to sell the whole thing.

  4. The Taxation Disaster – One missed tax bill, and the county sold the land out from under us.

  5. The Zoning Fiasco – Looked buildable, but was actually inside a conservation overlay zone.

Each of these stories comes with simple solutions you can use today. Think of it as your “deepfake detector” for land deals.

Why This Matters Right Now

  • Scams are everywhere. From TikTok arrests to fake orca videos, the theme is the same: verify before you believe.

  • Tired makes you sloppy. Just like the “Tired Girl” trend, tired buyers skip due diligence. That’s how scammers win.

  • But you can stay ahead. With a few simple checks—title, zoning, ownership—you can avoid 90% of land scams.

1. Watch my full video breakdown here ttps://youtu.be/7TvacY5rh5k 

2. Grab my free ebook: Kirk’s Land Scams Red Flag Checklist [COMING SOON]

3. Or if you’re ready to buy land the EASY and AFFORDABLE, check out LotsofSunshine.com.

Don’t get caught like Tatiana on TikTok, fooled like the fake orca fans, or too tired to double-check like the Gen Z burnout crowd.

item.title: Father’s Day Wisdom: 5 Land Scams That Almost Got Me (Don’t Let ‘Em Get You)
item.description:
,

In the spirit of Father’s Day, I thought I’d share some dad-grade wisdom — the kind earned through big land-buying mistakes and a few “what was I thinking” moments

Father’s Day Land Deals

0.86 Acres of Freedom - $99 Down - CLICK HERE

0.93 Acres of Country Living 7 Miles from DownTown - $99 Down - CLICK HERE

🔥SEE MORE


Because if there’s one thing dads are good at, it’s messing up just enough that you don’t have to.

So here it is: the Top 5 Land-Buying Scams (or screwups) that nearly cost me thousands — and the lessons that’ll save you a fortune

1. Brent the Bad Broker - He double-sold the property thanks to a title lag.

We almost got played… but a payment delay saved us.

Dad Advice: Check title status again after recording. Better yet, use a title company and sleep like a baby.

2. Nathan the Naïve Nephew - Uncle left him land in a will — but probate never happened.

So he didn’t own squat.

Dad Advice: The name on the title better match their ID. If not? Run faster than a dad who just sat down and heard, “Can you come look at this?”

3. Fractional Francine - Only owned half the property. Thought that was enough.

It wasn’t.

Dad Advice: Always check the chain of title. If ownership is sliced like a holiday pie, don’t buy the plate.

4. The Tax Trap - Title company missed back taxes. County sold it out from under us.

Luckily, we had title insurance. They paid us.

Dad Advice: Title insurance. Always. Don’t be the guy explaining to his family why the vacation lot is now owned by the county.

5. The Zoning Fiasco - Said “residential,” but was really in a conservation zone.

Translation: You’ll need lawyers, permits, and maybe a goat sacrifice to build.

Dad Advice: Know your zoning before you buy. If the road looks like it was made by deer hooves, that’s probably because it was.

🎁 Father’s Day Bonus:

Grab my Land Scam Red Flag Checklist and protect yourself like a real estate version of Liam Neeson.

Click here to download → [COMING SOON]

Whether you’re a dad, have a dad, or just like bad dad jokes — remember this:

Smart land buyers do their homework.

Great land buyers learn from other people’s mistakes.

Ready to find your own piece of paradise (without the scams)?

Browse fresh properties now at LotsofSunshine.com or give us a ring at (954) 639-4938.

Be GREAT!

Kirk P.

P.S. Today’s a great day to call your dad. Or, if you are the dad… treat yourself to land instead of another “World’s Okayest Griller” apron.

Our process is very fast and efficient, whether you're considering cash or choosing to finance.


At LotsofSunshine.com, your satisfaction is our priority. Simply click the land listings below and any land that works for your plans, select the "Buy Now" button to get started. With secure payments through GeekPay and Square, you can confidently submit payment.

Once you've made your deposit, we will immediately send over your Buyer Form for you to fill out so we can get started on your paperwork. Our team then drafts your Sales Agreement for you to authorize. More to come on the process as we navigate your land journey.

When you make your deposit, call us at (954) 639-4938 to confirm your purchase and start the contract process for your new land.

We're here to guide you and answer any questions. Plus, enjoy our 90-day money-back guarantee. If you’re not satisfied, we’ll refund your principal paid* or exchange your property for another in our portfolio.

item.title: Land Deals - 3 Reasons to UNSUBSCRIBE
item.description:
Hey



⚠️ CLICK HERE 🔥SUMMER SIZZLE

$49 Down Payments with a 12 month Early Pay Off Bonus that can save you up to 25%.



#1 … If you are someone who hates money


These emails are packed with super valuable deals that can save you $1000’s.  


Joseph just got his first lot paid off and it’s worth double what he bought it for.


We will also teach you how to make and save money with land.


We saved Zoe from buying a lot to build on that was zoned recreational.



Learn Zoning to Hack the System. Then Make or SAVE $1000's on your next Land Purchase!



#2 … If you don’t want to buy land


The top 1% in the world own land in the USA.  Just by owning land in the USA you will be among the wealthiest people in the world.


Eliud built a tiny home and put a small pool next to it.  He now owns a 1 ACRE retreat with $10,000’s in equity.



#3 … If you don’t believe in FREEDOM


Isaiah wanted to be free on his own land to raise chickens and grow tomatoes.  Now he is free from the stress of city life.  


You can be FREE also if you don’t hate money and you want to buy land. Call me to learn more.


Or just go ahead and step up to change your life and become a land owner today.


Be GREAT!
